title: Killer Klowns from Outer Space: The Game (2024)
imageAlt: Killer Klowns from Outer Space: The Game
bullets: Led production from Alpha to pre-release.
Scaled the team from 25 to 70 developers, introducing Agile frameworks and cross-discipline pipelines.
Transitioned the studio to Jira-based tracking with automations, saving ~1 day per sprint in management overhead.
Established an internal bug tracking process, improving resolution and visibility.
Managed publisher and stakeholder communications, roadmaps, and milestone deliveries.
Supported the formation of a Game Analytics team to guide feature development through data insights.

title: Captain ToonHead vs the Punks from Outer Space (2021)
imageAlt: Captain ToonHead vs the Punks from Outer Space
bullets: Supported production from Gold to Launch.
Developed automations to input text into game's dialogue system.
